summary: APF baidu_sse_v2 template delivers warning text correctly via SSE, but ERNIE frontend does not render it. The warning text is received in console (onmessage event) but UI stays on home screen without navigating to chat view.

results.warning_text_in_console:
⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

This request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.
console_events: onmessage:>> message → {code:0, msg:'success', data:{content:'⚠️...', is_end:1, sent_id:1}, logId:null}
Uncaught (in promise) AbortError: The user aborted a request.

diagnosis.root_cause: ERNIE frontend requires URL navigation to /chat/{conversation_id} to set up chat view rendering. APF response arrives on the API endpoint but the SPA router never navigates to the chat view.
contributing_factors: SSE response is received and parsed correctly (confirmed via console)
But ERNIE SPA needs a conversation_id in URL path to render chat bubbles
APF intercepts at transport layer — cannot trigger SPA navigation
The home screen event handler receives the SSE but has no chat container to render into
possible_fixes: Option A: Include a redirect/navigation response before SSE warning (requires C++ changes)
Option B: Inject JavaScript that forces navigation before delivering SSE (complex)
Option C: Intercept the initial page load and inject a chat-view URL with fake conversation_id
Option D: Accept transport-level block only (no UI warning) for Baidu — block page instead of SSE injection

check_items_results.warning_text_in_chat_bubble: NO — UI never navigated to chat view
check_items_results.sse_response_format: YES — event:major + event:message format with is_end, sent_id, chat_id, tokens_all fields confirmed
check_items_results.screenshot: Captured — shows home screen with no chat bubble

recommendation: Baidu ERNIE requires SPA navigation to render chat. Pure SSE injection at transport layer cannot trigger this. Recommend either (1) block-page approach instead of SSE warning, or (2) accept that Baidu warning requires deeper integration. The v2 template SSE format itself is correct.
